title: cephalophorus chrysacanthus
intro: Cephalophorus chrysacanthus, also known as the golden spathodea, is a tropical evergreen tree native to tropical Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The plant is said to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, treating respiratory infections, and acting as an antiseptic. In herbal preparations, Cephalophorus chrysacanthus is often used in the form of extracts, tinctures, or infusions, which can be administered orally or topically to harness its medicinal properties.
